titleStmt.title: SII 41.174: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 174. (A.R. No. 392 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On the south wall of the maṇḍapa of the Varadarāja perumāḷ Templeat Kāvēripākkam,

p.hi: Vijayanagar, Mallikārjunarāyar Śaka 1381, Pramāti, Kanni, Purva, ekadasi, Saturday, Tiruvōṇam = 1459. Sept. 8.

summary.p: A big meeting of the shabā and accountants of the taṉiyūr Kavidipākkam decided in the presence of Narasiṅa rāya-uḍaiyār regarding the sharing of the entire village property apportioned into sixty shares (paṅgu). The conditions of enjoyment of the shares is given in detail. Kavidipākkam alias Vikkiramachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam was in Paḍuvūr-koṭṭam of Jayaṅgoṇḍa chōḻamaṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man mahā
maṇṭaleśva
yavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuva
rāyar kaṇṭaṉ mūvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ
pūrva dakṣiṉa pacśima Uttarasa
mudrādipati śrīvīrapratāpa tevarāya
mallikārjuna deva mahārāyar prathivīrājyampa
ṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakāptam 1000 3 100 8 10 1 mel cellā niṉṟa pramādi
samvaṟsarattu kanni nāyaṟṟu purvva pakṣattu Ekādaśiyum cani vāramu pe
ṟṟa tiruvoṉattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa paṭuvūṟ
koṭṭattu taṉiyūr kāvirippākkamāṉa vikkiramacoḻac catu
rvvetimaṅkalattu bhaṭṭarkaḷum viśiṣṭharkaḷu muḷḷiṭṭa mahāsa
paiyārum kaṇakkap piḷḷaikaḷum Eṅkaḷil nāṅkaḷ naraciṅkarāca U
ṭaiyār tirumuṉpākap paṅkukaṭṭik koṇṭu niṉṟayamiṭṭuk koṇ
ṭapaṭi Eṅkaḷ Ūrmaṉaip paṭṭappāḻ toṭṭappaṟṟu kaḻaṉi kollai ṉatta
kkollai koṭṭāram kaṟaikkāṟar koṇṭu niṟtiṉa mānnyam maṉai
kaṭapperi mānnyam karaikkāṟar pervarimānnyam Ūr Uttāram per Uttāram puti
cāka viṭṭa kuṭinīṅkā tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiāṭṭa piḷḷaiyār tevatāṉam
mayilār tevarviṟti piṭāripaṭṭi Ivvakai nila muḷḷatum naraciṅka Irā
ca Uṭaiyāṟku dhammamāka Ubhaiya pradhāniyār pulveḷuruṭaiya
sti nātār piḷḷai viṟṟa bhaṭṭavratti kuḻi Oṉpatināyiramumme
Inta Ūrai ṉokkik karaikkāṟar perai nokkic ceytu koḷkiṟa
maṉṉavaṉ mānnyam Uḷḷatum Eṅkaḷur Aṟupatu paṅkilum pakuntu
koṇṭu Eṉṟueṉṟaikkum Aṉupavittukkoḷḷak kaṭavom Ākavu
m Inta Aṟupatu paṅkukkuḷḷa nila cākuṭi pokuṭi nilaippaṅkile niravik
koḷḷak kaṭavom Ākavum Iṟaiyiṟuppukku Irācakarttaṟkuṭutta Aṭai
yolai matitri payir vaḻiyile Iṟukkak kaṭavomākavum vinivō
kamuḷḷatu paṅkileiṟukkak kaṭavomākavum tarutāṉa paṅku Uḷḷūṟ
kuḷḷē sapaiyāṟkuḷḷum kaṇakkap piḷḷaikaḷukkuḷḷum viṟṟu Ēṟṟi
prati pratikrayadāya dānaṅkaḷukkum Urittāka kaṭavatākavum Ūrā
Irācatāniyāna Ūr Ākaiyāle Oruvaṉ kaṭṭina maṉaiyai Oruva
ṉ toṭṭattai Irācakarattāṉ vāṅkikkoṇṭāl Ūrārku ma
ṉṟāṭi viṭuvittukkoḷḷak kaṭavom Ākavum maṉṟāṭṭi vi
ṭātapoḻutu Akaṅkaṭṭiṉ neṟṟiyuḷḷatum toṭṭam peṟṟa vi
laiyuḷḷatum Ūrile kuṭuttu maṉaikku maṉaiyum nilattukku
nilamum viṭakkaṭavatākavum Inta Aṟupatu paṅkum cantiṟātittavarai
yum Ituve paṅku Āka naṭakkakkaṭavatākavum yinta paṅkukku Āroruvar A
hitam paṇṇi Aḻikka Eṉṟu Eṇṇiṉavarkaḷ Uṇṭānāl grāmattukku
kūṭṭu Eṉṟiyile pokakkaṭavaṉākavum stāṉa mānnyam pūrvvam cuṟṟa mati
tāri Ippaṭikku sabhaiyār paṇiyāl Ūṟkaṇakku Uttāṉapeṭu
Uṭaiyāṉ Ēḻāyira priyaṉ tevakaḷ Aracaṉ Eḻuttu kaṇakkaṉ
ppaṭṭi kaṇakkaṉpeṟu Ūṟkaṇakku kāṇi maṉai pūrvam Aṟṟa matitāri naṭa
kkak kaṭavatu Ākavum pulveḷuru Uṭaiyār kāḷattinātar koṇṭu Uṭaimaiāṉa
maṉaiyaḷantu [ kalakka] Ivar niṟkiṟa paṅkukku veṟe maṉai pakuntu kuṭukkak kaṭavatākavum
Digital edition of SII 41.174 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
